description: SyntheticImageGeneratorComponent — generate sample PNGs for Vision / OCR demos.

output_dir.label: Output Dir
output_dir.description: Filesystem directory to write PNGs into (created if missing).

samples.label: Samples
samples.description: `default` to use the built-in 3-image set, or `custom` to use `images` instead.

images.label: Images
images.description: When samples='custom', list of {sku, name, kind} dicts. The built-in renderer recognizes the names 'apple', 'blue car', 'green plant'; other names render a solid gray placeholder. Use samples='default' for the Vision-friendly set.

inject_exif.label: Inject Exif
inject_exif.description: If True, write a synthetic JPEG (not PNG) per image with realistic EXIF (Make, Model, DateTimeOriginal, ISO, GPS) — for demos of `image_exif_extractor`. Output extension flips to `.jpg` when this is on.

exif_gps_lat.label: Exif Gps Lat
exif_gps_lat.description: Decimal degrees; used as the demo GPS lat.

exif_gps_lon.label: Exif Gps Lon
exif_gps_lon.description: Decimal degrees; used as the demo GPS lon.

name: Synthetic Image Generator
